Retractor Lite 24 Hardware for Professional Trade Show Displays

Our Retractor Lite 24 Hardware provides a professional, portable solution for trade shows, events, and retail displays. This lightweight aluminum system features a compact design that sets up quickly and displays your custom banners with professional stability.

Professional Display Features

  • Lightweight aluminum base construction for durability and portability
  • Two swivel feet provide enhanced stability on various surfaces
  • Shock cord pole system enables quick setup and takedown
  • Snap rail attachment system for secure banner mounting
  • Banner tape bottom attachment for smooth display presentation
  • Available in professional black finish

Display Specifications

  • Display Size: 24.62" W x 83.5" H x 11" D
  • Product Weight: 5.25lbs for easy transport
  • Portable design ideal for frequent use
  • Compatible with custom banner printing services

Note: Banner printing sold separately. This hardware system is designed for use with custom printed banners up to 24" width.

Aluminum Construction & Stability Features for Retractor Hardware

The Retractor Lite 24 Hardware is constructed from high-quality materials designed for professional display applications and frequent transport.

Base Construction

  • Lightweight Aluminum Base: Durable aluminum construction provides professional appearance while maintaining portability for trade shows and events
  • Professional Black Finish: Sleek black coating complements any display environment and resists wear from frequent handling
  • Compact Base Design: 11" depth footprint fits in tight display spaces while maintaining stability

Stability System

  • Dual Swivel Feet: Two adjustable swivel feet accommodate uneven surfaces and provide enhanced stability during display
  • Shock Cord Pole: Internal shock cord system maintains pole tension and enables quick assembly without loose parts
  • Weight Distribution: 5.25lb total weight provides stability without requiring additional anchoring

Attachment Hardware

  • Snap Rail System: Top-mounted snap rail secures banners quickly and provides professional, wrinkle-free display
  • Banner Tape Compatible: Bottom attachment accommodates standard banner tape for smooth, professional presentation

Setup & Assembly Options for Retractable Banner Hardware

The Retractor Lite 24 Hardware is designed for quick professional setup with minimal assembly requirements.

Assembly Features

  • Tool-Free Setup: Complete assembly without additional tools - perfect for trade show environments
  • Shock Cord Pole System: Internal shock cord keeps pole sections connected and prevents lost components during setup
  • Quick-Connect Design: Pole sections snap together easily for rapid deployment at events

Banner Attachment Process

  • Snap Rail Installation: Simply insert banner into top snap rail channel for secure, professional mounting
  • Bottom Banner Tape: Attach banner bottom with included banner tape system for smooth display presentation
  • Height Adjustment: Extends to full 83.5" height for maximum visibility

Transport Configuration

  • Collapsible Design: Breaks down into compact components for easy transport between events
  • Lightweight Portability: 5.25lb total weight allows for single-person transport and setup
  • Professional Appearance: Black finish maintains professional appearance through repeated use

Setup Time: Complete assembly typically requires less than 2 minutes with minimal experience.

Banner Design Requirements for Retractor Lite 24 Hardware

Design specifications and requirements for custom banners used with the Retractor Lite 24 Hardware system.

Banner Dimensions

  • Maximum Width: 24" banner width for proper fit
  • Recommended Height: Up to 80" for optimal display within hardware frame
  • Minimum Height: 60" minimum for professional appearance
  • Bleed Area: Include 0.125" bleed on all sides for professional finishing

File Requirements

  • Resolution: 150 DPI minimum at actual print size
  • File Formats: PDF, AI, EPS, or high-resolution JPEG
  • Color Mode: CMYK color mode for accurate print reproduction
  • Font Requirements: Outline all fonts or include font files

Design Considerations

  • Top Attachment: Allow 1" at top for snap rail attachment area
  • Bottom Attachment: Reserve 1" at bottom for banner tape attachment
  • Safe Area: Keep important text and images 0.5" from edges
  • Readability: Use high contrast colors for maximum visibility

Artwork Services

  • Professional design services available
  • File review and optimization included with orders
  • Proof approval process ensures accurate reproduction
  • Customer service assistance with file preparation

Note: Banner printing services available separately. Contact customer service for banner printing options compatible with your Retractor Lite 24 Hardware.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Retractor Hardware

What banner size works with the Retractor Lite 24 Hardware?

The Retractor Lite 24 Hardware accommodates banners up to 24" wide and up to 80" tall. We recommend banner heights between 60-80" for optimal display within the hardware frame.

How much does the complete hardware system weigh?

The entire Retractor Lite 24 Hardware system weighs 5.25 pounds, making it easy to transport and ideal for frequent trade show use.

Is assembly required for the retractor hardware?

Yes, but assembly is tool-free and typically takes less than 2 minutes. The shock cord pole system keeps components connected and prevents lost parts during setup.

Can I use this hardware outdoors?

The Retractor Lite 24 Hardware is designed primarily for indoor use at trade shows, retail locations, and business events. For outdoor applications, additional anchoring may be required.

Do you sell the banners separately?

Yes, banner printing is available as a separate service. Our team can create custom banners designed specifically for your Retractor Lite 24 Hardware system.

What production time should I choose for my trade show?

For trade shows, we recommend 3 Business Days Standard production, plus shipping time. If your event is urgent, 2 Business Days Express is available, or contact customer service for same-day rush options.

Can I order multiple hardware units?

Yes, quantities from 1-1000 units are available. Contact customer service at 866.419.7446 for volume pricing on multiple retractor hardware units.

How do I attach my banner to the hardware?

Banners attach with a snap rail system at the top and banner tape at the bottom. Complete instructions are included with each hardware shipment.
